title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 446.130 - Plat and certificate recorded
text:
446.130.  Plat and certificate recorded. — He shall record such plat and certificate in a book to be by him kept and provided for that purpose, and shall deliver the original, with any depositions delivered to him, duly certified, to the recorder of the county.
(RSMo 1939 § 1983) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1819; 1919 § 5506; 1909 § 6449
